executives.name: Connie Duckworth
executives.background: Ms. Duckworth is a retired Partner and Managing Director of Goldman Sachs. She is the Founder and CEO Emeritus of ARZU Inc. She serves on the boards of Steelcase Inc. and Equity Residential.
